summary: Following the successful defense of the Empire against the undead by defeating the monster Gorden, Kang Hyunwoo receives a unique reward from Viscount Hyunwoo. After securing valuable loot and an epic item related to the Heavenly Demon's Dark Arts from the Emperor, Hyunwoo shifts his focus to mentoring a student and managing his personal life. The chapter concludes with him preparing for an upcoming high school reunion, specifically to confront a former classmate.
key_moments: Players defeat the main scenario undead after killing the monster Gorden.
Kang Hyunwoo receives the 'Symbol of the Meadow' and the 'Emperor's Gift' for his contributions.
Hyunwoo discovers the Emperor's gift is an epic item tied to the Heavenly Demon's Dark Arts.
Hyunwoo discusses Jisoo's upcoming surgery and his training progress with Mr. Yoon.
Hyunwoo agrees to attend a high school reunion to confront his rival, Jung Hanbaek.
